nodes.label: createLineCommentAnnotationRenderer()
mount()
render()
reconcile()
cleanup()
createLineCommentState()
draft()
nodes.snippet: draft = () => state.draft

nodes.label: setDraft()
nodes.snippet: setDraft = (value: string) => setState("draft", value)

nodes.label: editing()
nodes.snippet: editing = () => state.editing

nodes.label: setEditing()
nodes.snippet: setEditing = (value: T | null) => setState("editing", typeof value === "function" ? () => value : value)

nodes.label: toRange()
nodes.snippet: toRange = (range: SelectedLineRange | null) => (range ? cloneSelectedLineRange(range) : null)

nodes.label: setSelected()
setCommenting()
closeComment()
cancelDraft()
reset()
nodes.snippet:
reset = () => {
    setDraft("")
    setEditing(null)
    props.setOpened(null)
    props.setSelected(null)
    props.setCommenting(null)
  }

nodes.label: openComment()
toggleComment()
openDraft()
openEditor()
nodes.snippet:
openEditor = (id: T, range: SelectedLineRange, value: string) => {
    closeComment()
    setSelected(range)
    props.setCommenting(null)
    setEditing(id)
    setDraft(value)
  }

nodes.label: hoverComment()
finishSelection()
createLineCommentController()
onLineSelected()
onLineSelectionEnd()
onLineNumberSelectionEnd()
createLineCommentAnnotations()
line()
nodes.snippet: line = (range: SelectedLineRange) => Math.max(range.start, range.end)

nodes.label: createManagedLineCommentAnnotationRenderer()
createLineCommentHoverRenderer()
